title: Trump's Treasury boss visits NY diner, downplays gas-price surge as 'blip'
shortDescription: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent visited New York to promote Trump's economic policies amid surging gas prices and inflation.

title: Let the gold eagles soar: 250-foot high 'Arc to Trump' design unveiled
shortDescription: The president's latest attempt to remake Washington was just submitted to his handpicked Commission on Fine Arts.

title: Congressman Eliot Engel dead at 79. 'A fierce advocate'
shortDescription: Former Congressman Eliot Engel, staunch Trump opponent and Bronx native who represented Westchester, has died. He was 79.

title: Melania Trump's outfit sends a message. She's a victim, but not Epstein's
shortDescription: The first lady's fashion choices are often highly scrutinized, viewed as symbolic and spark conversation online.

title: Ossoff puts backing behind bill requiring local approval for ICE sites
shortDescription: A new federal bill would require the DHS to get local approval from towns before building new ICE facilities, including two sites in Georgia.

title: Pope Leo praises Iran war ceasefire after criticizing Trump threat
shortDescription: Pope Leo praised the two-week ceasefire in the Iran war, hours after calling President Trump's threat against the population of Iran 'unacceptable'.

title: Mike Pence endorses Indiana Senate candidate, breaking with Trump
shortDescription: Former Vice President Mike Pence and President Donald Trump are endorsing different candidates in one of the hotly contested Statehouse primaries.

title: Trump crashes out on MAGA media figures
shortDescription: President Donald Trump unloaded on former MAGA media allies after fierce criticism sparked by Iran war threats in a social media meltdown.

title: Trump's UFC 327 visit could snarl Miami traffic
shortDescription: President Donald Trump is scheduled to attend UFC 327 in Miami, Florida this weekend. What are his approval ratings?

title: Trump says Iran not honoring ceasefire terms
shortDescription: President Donald Trump accuses Iran of limiting Strait of Hormuz oil traffic as Tehran ties ceasefire terms to protection of Lebanon.

title: Did Donald Trump threaten the Pope? Here is what we know
shortDescription: A Vatican diplomat met with Pentagon officials in January, and now some people are asking if President Donald Trump threatened Pope Leo. What we know.

title: Trump nod may have 'ruined' GOP chances in CA governor's race
shortDescription: Does Trump's backing of former Fox News host Steve Hilton for California governor boost the leading GOP candidate chances? Political experts don't think so.

title: 'I'd do it.' Hunter Biden challenges Trump brothers to a cage fight
shortDescription: Andrew Callaghan told USA TODAY that he believed Hunter Biden made the comments "in jest" but that he's "more than happy to facilitate" the fight.

title: 'Losers.' Trump slams MAGA figures who criticized his Iran threats
shortDescription: The president slammed Tucker Carlson, Megyn Kelly, Candace Owens and Alex Jones, who raised concerns about the president's threats against Iran.

title: Trump's least favorite Republican congressman leading in primary poll
shortDescription: A congressional primary in Northern Kentucky between Rep. Thomas Massie and Ed Gallrein will test the power of President Donald Trump's endorsement.

title: Hunter Biden ‘in’ for cage match with Trump sons
shortDescription: Hunter Biden, son of former President Joe Biden, said he's "100% in" for a possible cage match with President Donald Trump's sons.

title: GOP blocks Democratic bill to end Iran war
shortDescription: Republicans in the House of Representatives blocked Democrats from considering a war powers resolution to halt military hostilities in Iran.

title: Melania Trump denies ties to Epstein associate. What do emails show?
shortDescription: Melania Trump said she had no relationship with Jeffrey Epstein and his associate Ghislaine Maxwell. Two emails may shed light on the matter.
